calendar.matters:
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2016 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2015 Continued To Mar-01-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. Plaintiff's and defendant's counsel are both sanctioned $400.00 each for failure to appear. The jurisdiction of the arbitrator is extended through Mar-01-2016. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Mar-01-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes/KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Have Request For Admission Deemed Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-24-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert E. Wood of Robert Wood Law telephone number (510)-986-0260 for Plaintiff; Jamieson Fong of Stratman, Patterson & Hunter telephone number (510)-457-3445 for Defendant.

Prior to commencement of the hearing, Counsel for the moving Party provided copies of the moving papers and proof of service. The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. In re DEFENDANT JOSE BARAJAS' Motion To Have Request For Admission Deemed Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions, Plaintiff is to provide verification to the original requests or amend responses. Defendant's Counsel is to prepare the order. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
